_comment: Experience metadata ONLY (UI layer, hand-authored). Canonical identity — layer, pair_document_id, sequence_narrative, source_authority, source_path — is read at runtime from canon-v1.0.json and must NEVER be copied into this file. Keys MUST be canon document_id values.
